payload.description: Implementation of Select Bus Service on 23rd Street in Manhattan

payload.limits: 1st Ave to 8th Ave (westbound bus lane), 10th Ave to 2nd Ave (eastbound bus lane)

payload.description: Westbound bus lanes: 1st Ave – 8th Ave; Eastbound bus lanes: 10th Ave – 2nd Ave
Bus lanes in effect 24/7 except westbound between 7th and 8th Ave
Flexible bollards to provide physical barrier for bus lanes
Existing left-turn restrictions: WB 9th Ave, WB 7th Ave, EB 6th Ave, WB 5th Ave, EB/WB Park Ave S
New turn restrictions: LT – EB 8th Ave, LT – Lexington Ave, LT – Broadway, RT – 6 Ave
